newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Q1 2026 (reported May) showed revenue ~$2.5B (+0.7% QoQ), GM 20.1%, and a Q2 guide of +14-16% revenue on AI-driven demand and price increases; next earnings Aug 6, 2026.

verdicts.rankRationale: CPO lens: SMIC's CPO/silicon-photonics exposure is indirect and tool-restricted; nothing new since June 9 changes that. Q2 +14-16% guide is China-localization/pricing-driven, not a CPO catalyst. Hold; flat +3.66% YTD and export-control/node-gap overhang unchanged.
verdicts.bull: China localization optionality and AI-driven pricing power; Q2 guide intact.
verdicts.neutral: CPO exposure remains indirect; thesis unchanged with no fresh catalyst.
verdicts.bear: Export controls and node gap cap advanced-packaging/CPO relevance versus leading-edge foundries.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Export controls and leading-edge node gap
